mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, created_time, updated_time FROM `user_address` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, created_time, updated_time FROM `user_address` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
